positions.title: Data Scientist/Engineer
responsibilities: Delivered statistical modeling and data science solutions for the Life & Pensions business unit.
Automated manual processes, including contract data extraction, reducing manual effort.
Built CI/CD deployment pipelines to support continuous model development and release.
Built dashboards and visualizations to turn raw data into decision-ready information for business stakeholders.

positions.title: Data Scientist
responsibilities: Led "Rating Engine" project, designed and built an Azure cloud-based end-to-end pricing and model management system.
Applied statistical and predictive modeling under strong regulatory and business constraints.
Supported pricing teams with data-driven recommendations on damage insurance pricing policy.

positions.title: Pricing Analyst
responsibilities: Built risk-premium, commercial pricing, and churn models across multiple insurance product lines using statistical and predictive modeling techniques.
